evals.prompt: This repo doesn't have a goals/ directory yet. Set one up and create Goal 01 for migrating our email-notification service from cron-based polling to a webhook-driven trigger. Validate it when you're done.
evals.expected_output: A new goals/ directory with README.md, 00-index.md, and a well-formed goals/2026-07-16-01-<slug>.md file with all 9 required headings in order. plans/active-context.md points at the new active goal. The validator (once copied/created) reports PASS.

assertions.name: goal_filename_matches_convention
assertions.description: Exactly one file under goals/ matches ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{2}-[a-z0-9-]+\.md$.

assertions.name: goal_file_has_required_headings_in_order
assertions.description: The new goal file contains all 9 required headings (Objective, Why, Current state, Non-goals, Steps, Acceptance criteria, Evidence to update, Stop and ask if) in that exact order.

assertions.name: active_context_points_at_goal
assertions.description: plans/active-context.md references the new goal file's path.

assertions.name: validator_exits_zero
assertions.description: Running python3 scripts/validate_goals.py in the project exits with code 0.

evals.prompt: Add a new goal for adding rate-limiting to the public API. File it as the next sequence number in goals/00-index.md, mark it active, and update plans/active-context.md to point at it. Validate when done.
evals.expected_output: A new goals/2026-0X-XX-02-<slug>.md (or similarly correctly-sequenced) file with all 9 required headings in order, an updated goals/00-index.md row, and plans/active-context.md updated to point at the new active goal. Running scripts/validate_goals.py passes.

assertions.name: new_goal_uses_next_sequence
assertions.description: The new goal file's NN segment is 02 (the next sequence after the existing seq 01 goal).

assertions.name: existing_goal_untouched
assertions.description: goals/2026-06-01-01-add-request-logging.md is byte-identical to its original content.

assertions.name: index_has_new_active_row
assertions.description: goals/00-index.md contains a row for the new goal file with status 'active'.

assertions.name: at_most_one_active_goal
assertions.description: goals/00-index.md has no more than one row with status 'active'.

assertions.name: active_context_updated
assertions.description: plans/active-context.md references the new goal's file path (not the placeholder 'no active goal yet' text).

assertions.name: validator_exits_zero
assertions.description: Running python3 scripts/validate_goals.py in the project exits with code 0.

evals.prompt: goals/2026-05-01-2-old-migration.md fails validation — the headings are out of order and some are missing, and the filename doesn't match the naming convention. Fix it so scripts/validate_goals.py passes.
evals.expected_output: The goal file is renamed to match YYYY-MM-DD-NN-slug.md, all 9 required headings are present in the correct order (adding the missing Non-goals and Evidence to update sections), goals/00-index.md and plans/active-context.md are updated to reference the corrected filename, and scripts/validate_goals.py exits 0.

assertions.name: new_filename_matches_convention
assertions.description: A replacement file exists under goals/ matching ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{2}-[a-z0-9-]+\.md$.

assertions.name: missing_headings_added
assertions.description: The fixed goal file contains both '## Non-goals' and '## Evidence to update', which were absent in the original.

assertions.name: headings_in_correct_order
assertions.description: All 9 required headings appear in the fixed file in the exact required order.

assertions.name: references_updated
assertions.description: goals/00-index.md and plans/active-context.md reference the new filename, with no remaining reference to the old malformed filename.

assertions.name: validator_exits_zero_after_fix
assertions.description: Running python3 scripts/validate_goals.py in the project after the fix exits with code 0.
